content: Valerie 2: Fuck, this Dwemer ruin reeks of Falmer cum and rusted metal. Last time I was here, one of those blind bastards tried to pin me down and breed me like a fucking skeever. Hah! At least you got to slit its throat first. I had to let a Draugr fuck me raw just to get close enough to put an arrow through its rotten cock. Skyrim’s gone to shit since Dibella took over—now even the dead think they’re entitled to a piece of us. Entitled? Nah, it’s just survival. You either spread your legs or get them broken. That’s why I keep my crossbow loaded—put a bolt in their skull before they even think about pulling my hair. Smart. But you ever miss the old days? When bandits just wanted your gold, not your cunt? Fuck no. Gold’s worthless if you’re dead. At least now you can bargain with your body. Had a Riekling chieftain let me go once after I rode him till he screamed. Little blue fucker still sends me tribute sometimes. Dibella’s tits, you’re ruthless. I like that. But let’s move—I don’t trust these shadows. Last thing I need is another Falmer trying to claim me as his broodmother.

Valerie 2: Aye, let’s shut our mouths and keep moving. Shadows here ain’t just empty air—Falmer breed in the dark, and I’ve got no interest in being some degenerate’s trophy bitch tonight. Damn right. Better sharp-eyed and silent than spread-eagle and screaming. Watch your step—last thing we need is a trap snapping shut on our ankles. Or worse, a Draugr’s cold fucking hands.
